title: Spirit Shader
description: High Performance Shader With Simple Lighting And No Shadows
body:
**With simple lighting and no shadows, this shader is designed specifically for low-end hardware, “potato” PCs, and players who value high FPS above all else.**
___

This shader focuses on performance first, delivering a lightweight visual upgrade over vanilla without the heavy resource cost of traditional shaders.

Features include: enhanced lighting, subtle atmospheric improvements, improved sky/weather visuals, and small color enhancements while maintaining smooth gameplay even on slower systems. By avoiding expensive effects like dynamic shadows, reflections, volumetric lighting, and other demanding features, this shader keeps frame rates high and input responsive.

This pack aims to make Minecraft look cleaner and more vibrant while staying optimized for older laptops, integrated graphics, and budget hardware. If you want the feel of a shader without sacrificing performance, this pack is built for you.
